required_skills: Test Automation Framework Design and Architecture
Page Object Model and Design Pattern Implementation
Continuous Testing Integration in CI/CD Pipelines
Programming for Test Automation in Python or Java
Version Control and Test Suite Maintenance with Git
preferred_skills: Mobile Test Automation for Android and iOS
Contract Testing and Consumer-Driven Contract Validation
AI-Assisted Test Generation and Self-Healing Selectors
Chaos and Fault Injection Test Automation
responsibilities: Architect and build modular, reusable end-to-end test automation frameworks using Playwright or Selenium with Page Object Model patterns that scale across multiple product domains
Develop comprehensive API automation test suites using RestAssured or Postman Collections that validate request schemas, response contracts, authentication flows, and error handling edge cases
Integrate automation test suites into CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions or Jenkins with parallel execution, flakiness detection, and mandatory quality gate enforcement on every pull request
Design data-driven test architectures that decouple test logic from test data using external fixtures, parameterized inputs, and environment-specific configuration management
Implement cross-browser and cross-device test execution grids using BrowserStack or Sauce Labs to validate UI consistency across all supported browser and OS matrix combinations
Build real-time test reporting dashboards using Allure or custom integrations that surface pass rates, failure trends, coverage gaps, and flakiness metrics to engineering leadership
Develop mobile UI automation test suites using Appium for Android and iOS platforms covering native, hybrid, and responsive web application flows
Establish and enforce automation coding standards, pull request review checklists, and framework contribution guidelines to maintain long-term test suite maintainability
Perform root cause analysis on flaky or failing automated tests by correlating test logs, screenshots, and network traces to distinguish product defects from environment issues
Collaborate with developers and product managers during sprint planning to define automation scope, acceptance criteria, and coverage targets for each feature release
